title: Israel strikes Beirut and southern Lebanon after large-scale evacuation orders
summary_full: The Israeli military has ordered Lebanese residents to leave some 17% of the country's territory.
summary_public: The Israeli military has ordered Lebanese residents to leave some 17% of the country's territory.
